column33: The line usually gets very long before the pantry opens and if you line up and get a spot near the end when you usually get in there’s only produce left or grains and it is a bit underwhelming if you stayed in the long line during the opening. I think a solution would be to stock between visitors especially at the opening so that there are more options for those visitors who do come near opening but are at the end of the line. Maybe also the pantry could post on the story the kind of food that will be available that day so that people can be more selective on the days they choose to go.
column39: Sometimes asking for the Mobile Pantry is a little bit embarrassing. At least the one I used at the El Centro location because I had to ask the front desk people while it was busy and it was a little inconvenient for them to leave the front desk to help me. But I understand that the mobile pantries are usually locked and need to get opened with assistance so it makes sense.
